TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 05

JUDGE JOSEPH A. DESMOND;JLOPEZ,REPORTER;JPASTOR/DOKAZAKI, CLERK. PLTF EFRIAN LAGUARDIA PRESENT WITH ATTY GUADALUPE GAMINO; DEFT IN PRO PER. PLTF SUBMITS REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE, FILED AND ENTERED. 10:26AM CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. WITNESS MS. MONTALVO SWORN AND EXAMINED. PLTF EXHIBIT #1, INCIDENT REPORT, MARKED FOR IDENTIFICATION. PLTF EXHIBIT #2, THREE DOCUMENTS, MARKED FOR IDENTIFICATION. PLTF EXHIBIT #3, NOTICE OF VIOLATION, MARKED FOR ID. 10:35AM NO CROSS EXAMINATION BY DEFT. WITNESS EXCUSED. 10:36AM DEFT. PLATT SWORN AND EXAMINED. 10:43AM CROSS EXAMINATION BY PLTF COUNSEL. 10:50AM WITNESS EXCUSED. PLAINTIFF RESTS. PLTF. EXHIBITS #1, #2 & #3 MOVED INTO EVIDENCE. MOTION TO WITHDRAW EXHIBITS DENIED. MATTER SUBMITTED. JUDGMENT UNDER SUBMISSION. 10:52AM COURT ADJOURNED.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR
